caption: An older man with short gray hair and glasses is seated outdoors against a backdrop of lush green foliage. He wears a light-beige button-down shirt over a green t-shirt and is looking down at a tablet held in his hands. He sits on a light-colored bench, maintaining a neutral to slightly smiling expression. Overlaid across the bottom of the scene is a blue banner with white text. In the first frame, the text is incomplete, reading "TO GIVE YOU". In the second frame, the full phrase "TO GIVE YOU THE COMPETITIVE INFORMATIONAL EDGE YOU NEED TO SUCCEED" appears. The final two frames show the man continuing to look at his device while the full text remains on screen. The setting and the man's position remain consistent throughout the sequence, with only subtle changes in his facial expression and the progression of the on-screen text.
